_meta.architectural_mandate: O(1) dictionary routing. UI presentation managed via _index array. Unified telemetry scoring. Self-healing fallback logic for core execution nodes.

support_infrastructure.message: If this architecture provides value, consider supporting the deployment infrastructure.

deepseek-r1.label: DeepSeek R1
deepseek-r1.description: Maximum reasoning yield at zero marginal cost. The undisputed workhorse of the subscription tier.

deepseek/deepseek-v3.2.label: DeepSeek V3.2
deepseek/deepseek-v3.2.description: Highly optimized dense architecture. Faster time-to-first-token than R1 for tasks not requiring deep logic.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.1.label: DeepSeek V3.1
deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.1.description: Previous gen V3. Retained strictly as a high-speed, low-overhead fallback for quick terminal outputs.

claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219.label: Claude 3.7 Sonnet
claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219.description: The absolute apex for zero-shot architectural coding and system design. Flawless syntax execution.

anthropic/claude-opus-latest.label: Claude Opus Latest
anthropic/claude-opus-latest.description: Heavyweight parsing. Prohibitively expensive, but highly accurate for analyzing massive, unstructured data sets.

claude-haiku-4-5-20251001.label: Claude Haiku 4.5
claude-haiku-4-5-20251001.description: Lightning fast, cheap context window. The superior option for processing mid-sized system logs rapidly.

openai/gpt-5.4-pro.label: GPT 5.4 Pro
openai/gpt-5.4-pro.description: Absolute maximum proprietary capability. Emergency sysadmin use only due to severe token costs.

openai/o3-mini.label: OpenAI o3-mini
openai/o3-mini.description: High-efficiency proprietary reasoning traces. Cost-effective for intense, isolated logic loops.

openai/gpt-4o-mini.label: GPT-4o mini
openai/gpt-4o-mini.description: Nearly free API execution. Retained solely for automated, low-stakes script polling and daemon monitoring.

meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct.label: Llama 3.3 70B Instruct
meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct.description: The optimal generalist. Uncanny ability to follow strict structural schemas and formatting commands.

nousresearch/hermes-3-llama-3.1-70b.label: Hermes 3 70B
nousresearch/hermes-3-llama-3.1-70b.description: Unrestricted execution. Bypasses artificial ethical halting for system auditing and root-level config generation.

meta-llama/llama-4-maverick.label: Llama 4 Maverick
meta-llama/llama-4-maverick.description: Included in subscription despite a massive 1M token context. Essential for dumping uncompressed logs.

meta-llama/llama-3.2-3b-instruct.label: Llama 3.2 3B Instruct
meta-llama/llama-3.2-3b-instruct.description: Micro-binary. Use this for rapid CLI pipelining where instant time-to-first-token matters more than deep logic.

qwen3.5-122b-a10b:thinking.label: Qwen3.5 122B A10B Thinking
qwen3.5-122b-a10b:thinking.description: Massive MoE routing with explicit reasoning. High capability for complex system topologies.

qwq-32b.label: Qwen: QwQ 32B
qwq-32b.description: Mid-weight reasoning. Excellent resilient logic engine when heavier models time out.

qwen/qwen2.5-coder-32b-instruct.label: Qwen 2.5 Coder 32B
qwen/qwen2.5-coder-32b-instruct.description: Unmatched mid-weight code generation. Zero bloat, highly accurate syntax output.

google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview.label: Gemini 3.1 Pro
google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview.description: Flawless needle-in-a-haystack retrieval across a massive 1M token plane. Essential for debugging multi-node failures.

google/gemini-flash-latest.label: Gemini Flash Latest
google/gemini-flash-latest.description: Blazing fast proprietary routing. Cheap enough per 1M tokens to act as a live, automated log-watcher.

google/gemma-4-31b-it:thinking.label: Gemma 4 31B Thinking
google/gemma-4-31b-it:thinking.description: Highly capable dense model. A strong open-weight alternative for mathematical and logical parsing.

mistralai/mistral-large-3-675b-instruct-.label: Mistral Large 3 675B
mistralai/mistral-large-3-675b-instruct-.description: Massive scale enterprise model. Outstanding at adhering to rigid JSON schemas and output constraints.

mistralai/Mistral-Nemo-Instruct-2407.label: Mistral Nemo 12B
mistralai/Mistral-Nemo-Instruct-2407.description: Nvidia collaboration edge model. A solid budget local-equivalent for standard terminal queries.

zai-org/glm-5:thinking.label: GLM 5 Thinking
zai-org/glm-5:thinking.description: Zhipu's latest flagship. Provides a distinct architectural approach to reasoning compared to Western models.

zai-org/glm-4.7-flash.label: GLM 4.7 Flash
zai-org/glm-4.7-flash.description: Maximum throughput API routing. Use for rapid text parsing where latency is the primary constraint.
